title: ficus fistulosa f. benguetensis
intro: Ficus fistulosa f. benguetensis, also known as Benguet ficus, is a plant species belonging to the Moraceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Ficus fistulosa f. benguetensis often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
